bird.name: 漠澳鵖
bird.summary: 漠澳䳭（台湾作南澳鵖，学名：Ashbyia lovensis），是雀形目吸蜜鸟科的一种鸟类，属于单型的漠澳䳭属（学名：Ashbyia）。 漠澳䳭体重约17.5克，翼长约74.3毫米，喙宽度约3.1毫米，喙厚度约3.6毫米，嘴峰长约13.9毫米，跗蹠长约20.6毫米，尾长约39.…

relations.subject: 漠澳鵖
relations.evidence: This habitat can include very open shrubland or grasslands
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 漠澳鵖
relations.evidence: This habitat can include very open shrubland or grasslands
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 漠澳鵖
relations.evidence: It is also found in low chenopod shrubland, which is mainly dominated by plant species such as Sclerolaena and Atriplex on higher ground.Wyndham, E
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
